headline: Selangor's integrity unit recovered RM47 million from internal fraud
context: Selangor's state integrity and governance unit recovered RM47 million from internal fraud cases in 2025, becoming a model for state-level anti-corruption efforts.

cards.big: Selangor recovered RM47 million through its own anti-fraud unit in one year
cards.sub: State-level integrity mechanism proving more effective than waiting for federal intervention

cards.big: Integrity unit operates under Selangor Enactment 2/2020 with subpoena powers
cards.sub: Legal framework gives investigators real authority unlike advisory-only federal equivalents

cards.big: RM47 million recovery came from just RM3.2 million operational budget
cards.sub: Return on investment of 14:1 makes this one of government's most cost-effective agencies

cards.big: Only 3 states have established dedicated integrity units as of March 2026
cards.sub: 10 states lack equivalent mechanisms leaving state-level corruption largely unchecked

cards.big: Selangor proved state anti-corruption works — the question is why other states won't follow
Should federal policy mandate every state establish an integrity unit by 2028?
